prestazioni: M50B40 (3.0L I6) or M60B40 (4.0L V8) engine swap with a custom-built forced induction setup using a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping system from Vibrant Performance, supporting up to 12 psi of boost on 98 RON fuel with a Motec M150 ECU managing fuel, ignition, and boost control via sequential injection and individual coil-on-plug ignition

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a ZF 6HP28 6-speed automatic transmission with a Level 10 torque converter and a custom billet flexplate from Spec Clutch, paired with a 3.91:1 limited-slip differential from a BMW E39 M5 (S62) for improved acceleration and torque handling

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (E38-specific valving) featuring 8-way adjustable damping, spherical bearing top mounts from SuperPro, and poly bushings for the front control arms and subframe, complemented by a full Eibach Pro-Kit sway bar set (24mm front, 18mm rear) to reduce body roll while maintaining ride comfort
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (E38-specific) with custom carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler, all finished in a matte BMW Individual Nogaro Silver (354) paint with hand-painted gold pinstriping by Cartellone Design

Custom 20" BBS LM-R wheels (8.5J front, 9.5J rear) with a staggered fitment (245/35/20 front, 275/30/20 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with a full AP Racing BBK (380mm front, 355mm rear) with 6-piston calipers up front and 4-piston calipers in the rear, all painted in BMW Motorsport blue (L043)

Full custom interior retrim in Nappa leather with Alcantara headliner and door cards, featuring Recaro Pole Position seats (E38-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in BMW Individual Merino leather (4AN) with contrast red stitching, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm) and a custom digital gauge cluster from AIM MXS Strada
